title: Finite KKT Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite KKT bad stationarity QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact KKT replay computes stationarity residual -1 for multiplier 1 at x = 1, so the malformed zero-stationarity row has error 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional KKT rows only when they add distinct stationarity, active-set, complementarity, duality, or SDP pressure; keep general KKT sufficiency, constraint qualifications, and algorithm convergence in horizon lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite KKT witnesses as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay polynomial values, derivative values, stationarity residuals, primal/dual feasibility, and complementary slackness over exact rationals.
Route false KKT stationarity claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the offending residual.
Keep general KKT necessity/sufficiency, constraint qualifications, SDP duality, and convergence claims marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
